title: lobelia borneensis subsp. grandiflora
intro: Lobelia borneensis subsp. grandiflora is a subspecies of Lobelia borneensis, a flowering plant native to Borneo and belonging to the family Campanulaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a natural expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Lobelia borneensis subsp. grandiflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and provide antioxidant properties. It is commonly used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
